ttl.name: REAR SEAT ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

atten4.ptxt: A bolt without a torque specification is shown in the standard bolt chart. (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT RECLINING ADJUSTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat reclining adjuster assembly with the 4 bolts.

atten3.ptxt: Tighten the bolts in the order shown in the illustration to install the rear seat reclining adjuster assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat reclining control cable.
Engage the 2 clips and claw and then install the reclining remote control lever sub-assembly.
Adjust the control lever to set the rear reclining adjuster assembly to its upper most position.
Pull plate A toward the front of the vehicle to lock the plate.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH
INSTALL REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws and 2 clips, then install the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT CENTER ARMREST BOX ASSEMBLY
INSTALL CENTER SEAT ARMREST PLATE INNER
INSTALL CENTER SEAT BACK COVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the center seat back cover sub-assembly with the hook.
Using hog ring pliers, install 2 new hog rings.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR CENTER SEAT ARMREST ASSEMBLY
INSTALL REAR SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for LH Side)
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for LH Side)
INSTALL REAR BENCH TYPE SEAT CUSHION COVER

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install 16 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the rear bench type seat cushion cover to the seat cushion pad with 36 new hog rings.
